title: RESEARCH PROTOCOL: Effectiveness of Teledentistry and mHealth Interventions Compared to Traditional In-Person Dental Care: An Umbrella Review of Systematic Reviews
author: Uribe, Sergio
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This umbrella review protocol evaluates the effectiveness of teledentistry and mobile health interventions compared to traditional in-person dental care by synthesizing systematic reviews published from 2010-2024 across different databases to inform evidence-based clinical practice guidelines.
steps_raw: This umbrella review protocol evaluates the effectiveness of teledentistry and mobile health interventions compared to traditional in-person dental care by synthesizing systematic reviews published from 2010-2024 across different databases to inform evidence-based clinical practice guidelines.
